description: Ledger kernel activation (SessionStart, all hosts) + proof-binding enforcement (Stop, Claude Code). Uses Money.from + double-entry invariants from the ledger kernel.

hooks.powershell: if (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { node "$env:GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\ledger-activate.js" } elseif (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { node "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\ledger-activate.js" }

hooks.statusMessage: Checking figures against ledger kernel proof...
